repo.description: Moss Vortex is a lightweight and high-performance deployment and inference backend engineered specifically for MOSS 003, providing a wealth of features aimed at enhancing performance and functionality, built upon the foundations of MOSEC and Torch.

terms.context_snippet: Moss Vortex is a lightweight, fast, simple, and high-performance deployment and inference backend engineered specifically for MOSS 003, providing a wealth of features aimed at enhancing performance and functionality, built upon the foundations of MOSEC and Torch.
